Example: Grand Total Store Sales:
SELECT 
  Store,
  COUNT(*) as Rows,
  SUM(CAST("Qty Sold" AS DOUBLE)) as Qty,
  SUM(CAST("Qty Sold" AS DOUBLE) * CAST(Price AS DOUBLE)) as "Total Price",
  SUM(CASE WHEN CAST("Qty Sold" AS DOUBLE) * CAST(Price AS DOUBLE) < 0 THEN CAST("Qty Sold" AS DOUBLE) * CAST(Price AS DOUBLE) ELSE 0 END) as "Neg Total"
FROM dataset
GROUP BY ROLLUP(Store)
ORDER BY Store
